Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-27-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE: CHARLES SANDERS, TEL. NO. (910)830-0556. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS- PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC., Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award- GRANTED- NO OPPPOSITION FILED. (301/JLW/JU). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-31-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC.'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award: DENIED; INSUFFICIENT SERVICE. Per CCP 1290.4(b)(1), a petition to confirm an arbitration award must be personally served. Here, petitioner mailed the petition to confirm. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
